name: Kymera Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I . We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to reinventing the treatment of human disease through the development of innovative, highly differentiated oral medicines that address significant health problems and meaningfully improve patients lives. We are committed to advancing novel technologies to address targets that have known disease-causing biology, but which have not been drugged, or have been inadequately drugged, often based on limitations of existing technologie...
